overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European city at night. The character traverses narrow cobblestone alleys, ascends stone staircases, crosses a bridge, and enters a plaza with a fountain and towering keep, all illuminated by warm torchlight against a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between half-timbered medieval buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow cobblestone alleyway between timber-framed houses

notable_agents.action: two townspeople standing and conversing near a doorway

entered.detail: traditional half-timbered house with white plaster and dark wooden beams
stone wall with small windows and wooden doorframes
wooden support beams and scaffolding attached to building facade
tall red flowering plants growing beside the path
simple wooden bench placed against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone alley between medieval half-timbered buildings. Warm torchlight illuminates the scene as Geralt walks forward, passing red flowers and a wooden bench on the left. Two NPCs stand conversing near a doorway as the character approaches a stone staircase in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase passing through a city gate archway

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs leading upward through the city
passing through the stone archway gate into a more open street beyond

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while moving through a covered archway passage

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at the top of the stairs holding a torch

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps leading upward
large stone archway with portcullis and defensive structure
large metal brazier with bright flames providing illumination
wooden wagon parked against the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a wide stone staircase leading through a fortified archway gate. A burning brazier illuminates the right side where a guard stands watch. The character passes through the archway, leaving the narrow alley behind and emerging into a broader cobblestone street with timber houses on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: sloped cobblestone street between medieval houses

agents.ego_description: walking along a sloping cobblestone street between timber and stone buildings

entered.detail: gently sloping cobblestone street with drainage channels
tall stone wall supporting the elevated path above
tall dark stone tower visible in the far distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sloping cobblestone street that curves between medieval buildings, the path gradually ascends. A tall stone tower becomes visible in the far distance. The street is lined with timber-framed houses on the left and a high stone retaining wall on the right, with sparse vegetation growing along the edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone bridge crossing over lower district

events.description: character ascends final flight of stairs onto an elevated stone bridge

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to reach an elevated bridge then walking across it

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking across the bridge in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide elevated stone bridge with cobblestone surface crossing the town
low stone wall railing along the edge of the bridge
open plaza area visible at the end of the bridge with buildings surrounding it

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends onto a wide elevated stone bridge that spans across the lower parts of the city. The bridge features stone railings and offers a view of the town below. An armored guard walks past in the opposite direction. At the far end of the bridge, a town plaza with a fountain becomes visible, with the tall tower now looming larger in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with central fountain and towering keep

events.description: character stops and looks upward at the tall tower dominating the plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching the central fountain and looking up at the towering structure above

notable_agents.action: guard standing near a wooden signpost holding a polearm

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with multiple tiers and flowing water
massive cylindrical stone tower with lit windows and crenellations at the top
stone seating arranged around the plaza perimeter
tall wooden post with directional signs pointing to different locations

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious town square dominated by an ornate stone fountain in the center and a massive cylindrical tower rising in the background. The plaza is paved with stone tiles and features benches and a wooden signpost. Geralt approaches the fountain and looks upward, revealing the full height of the tower against the night sky with a crescent moon visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped medieval alleyway that gradually opens into a grand, elevated town plaza. It begins in a narrow cobblestone passage lined with half-timbered buildings and warm torchlight, moving past red flowers and conversing NPCs toward a distant stone staircase. As Geralt ascends the stairs and passes through a fortified archway guarded by a burning brazier, the scene expands into a broader, sloping street that curves upward between timber houses and a high stone wall. The path then leads onto a wide elevated bridge with stone railings, offering a view of the city below before turning toward a distant fountain and a looming tower. Finally, the camera enters a spacious stone plaza dominated by an ornate fountain, tilting upward to reveal the full height of a massive cylindrical tower set against a night sky and a crescent moon.
